instruction: How can I match and replace the values in Sheet1 and Sheet2 with those in the LabelS sheet based on column B? Specifically, if the value in cell B2 of Sheet1 or Sheet2 does not match the value in cell B2 of the LabelS sheet, then B2 in Sheet1 or Sheet2 should be replaced with the corresponding value from the LabelS sheet. This comparison and replacement should be done for each cell in column B. After the replacement, column B in both Sheet1 and Sheet2 should match column B in the LabelS sheet - the outcome I'm expecting are detailed in 'Dashboard' and 'Archive'. My actual dataset could be up to 500 rows.
